feedback: Internet speed has been consistently excellent for the past few months. I work from home and rely heavily on stable high-speed connectivity for video calls and large file uploads. This network delivers exactly what was promised in my plan without any throttling during peak hours.

Data balance keeps disappearing overnight even when I am not using the phone. Something is seriously wrong with how they calculate usage. I checked my background apps and nothing explains the drain. Very frustrating to wake up with zero balance every morning.
intrenet speed is so slow cant even load a webpage properly. paying for 100mbps but barely getting 10

Data validity of 28 days is too short for the amount of data given. I always have leftover data that expires before I can use it. They should offer rollover options or at least extend validity to 30 days minimum. It feels like a waste of money every single cycle.
Good internet speed. Downloads are fast enough for my needs.
plz fix the data balance issue. i recharged yesterday and already shows 50% used. no way i consumed that much data in one day. this is theft

The internet speed on this plan is blazing fast. I stream 4K content without any buffering and the data validity period of 84 days gives me plenty of time to use my full quota. Really happy with this combination of speed and flexible validity.
Data balance notification feature in the app is very helpful. Easy to track usage.
omg worst internet speed ever. buffering on every single video. how is this even a 4G connection
Data validity is decent. 56 days works for me.

The internet speed drops significantly after I cross 1GB daily limit. The throttled speed is practically unusable for anything beyond basic messaging. I understand fair usage policies but throttling to 64kbps is too aggressive. At least give us 512kbps post limit.
Happy with data validity on the annual plan. No complaints.
ngl disappointed with the intrenet speed lately. used to be fast but now its terrible during evenings

I purchased the 2GB daily plan expecting good internet speed but the actual throughput is barely enough for streaming in 480p. The data balance tracking in the app seems inaccurate too as it shows more consumption than what my phone reports. Double disappointment.
Internet speed is average. Not fast not slow.
ur data validity plans r a rip off. 24 days for that price?? other providers give 28 days minimum

Excellent internet speeds throughout the day. Very consistent performance that I have come to rely on for my remote work setup. The connection handles multiple devices simultaneously without any noticeable degradation. Worth every rupee of the premium plan.
Data balance shows zero but I recharged just 3 days ago. Something is wrong.
tbh ok speed for the price. data validity could be longer though. 28 days feels short for the amount they charge

Internet speed has improved after the recent tower upgrade in our locality. I am getting speeds close to what was advertised in my plan which was never the case before. Downloads that used to take minutes now complete in seconds. Very pleased with the improvement.
Data validity is fine for monthly plans. No issues there.
custmer care said my data balance issue will be resolved in 24 hrs. its been 3 days now. no callback nothing. terrible service all around

Really fast internet speed on 5G. Impressed with the consistency even during peak evening hours when everyone in the building is streaming. Data balance tracking in the app is accurate and helpful for managing my daily consumption without surprises.
Internet speed is okayish. Manageable for basic browsing.
cant blv how quickly my data balance finishes. i barely use my phone and its gone in 2 days. prblm with their counting system for sure

The data validity on the 365-day plan is excellent value. I do not have to worry about monthly recharges and the internet speed remains consistent throughout the year. The convenience factor alone makes this plan worth recommending to everyone in my family.
Slow internet speed in my area. Barely usable after 6 PM.
Data balance tracking is accurate and transparent. Appreciate it.
v bad intrenet speed in the evenings. data validity also too short for the price. not worth it at all compared to what competitors offer these days

I love that the data validity on my current plan is 84 days which gives me ample time to consume all my data without feeling rushed. The internet speed is adequate for streaming and gaming and I never worry about running out before the expiry date.
Internet speed fluctuates too much. Inconsistent throughout the day.
plz check my data balance. i reacharged 2gb plan but app shows only 500mb remaining after one day. this is not correct plz fix

The data validity period is reasonable for the price point. Internet speeds are consistently good throughout my billing cycle. I appreciate that there is no artificial throttling before the validity expires which is something my previous provider used to do.
Data balance is always inaccurate. Cannot trust the numbers shown.
Fast internet. No complaints about speed or data balance.
omg the data validity on this plan is a joke. 14 days for that amount of data?? who finishes 50gb in 14 days unless ur streaming all day. give us proper validity periods

Internet speed meets expectations for the plan I have chosen. It is neither impressively fast nor frustratingly slow. Data balance consumption seems proportional to my actual usage which is reassuring. Overall a middling experience that does what it needs to do.
Terrible internet speed since morning. Cannot even send emails.

The 90-day data validity plan is perfect for infrequent users like me. I do not consume much data daily so having three months to use my allocation takes all the pressure off. Internet speed when I do use it is perfectly adequate for my light browsing needs.
Data balance seems fine. Matches my usage pattern.
prblm with intrenet speed and data balance both. speed is pathetic and data finishes in 2 days even though i barely watch videos. custmer care was useless too
Decent internet speed on most days. Acceptable for my work.

I appreciate the extended data validity on the annual prepaid plan. Combined with the generous data allocation and solid internet speeds I get throughout the year, this is easily the best value plan I have used from any carrier. The data balance also carries over which is a huge plus.
Internet speed is nothing special. Average at best.
ur data balance system is broken. charged me for data i didnt use. want refund asap

Internet speed is super fast on this new plan. Very satisfied with the upgrade decision. Streaming and gaming both work flawlessly. The data validity of 56 days is generous enough and my data balance lasts comfortably through the cycle.
Data validity on the weekly plan is too short. Not practical.

The internet speed has been consistently terrible for the entire week in my area. I have run multiple speed tests showing barely 2 Mbps when my plan promises 50 Mbps. This is clearly a network congestion issue they refuse to acknowledge or address despite repeated complaints.
Good data balance management through the app. Easy to monitor.
ngl the internet speed on this plan is fire. downloads finish before i even look away from the screen. best decision switching here

Data validity should be standardized to 30 days minimum across all plans. The current system where different plans have wildly different validity periods from 14 to 84 days is confusing and makes comparison shopping very difficult for average consumers.
Fast and reliable internet. Data balance accurate too.
plz increase data validity on the 199 plan. 24 days is not enough for 1.5gb daily. by the time validity ends i still have data left unused. total waste

Internet speed has been phenomenal since I upgraded to the fiber-backed 5G plan. Consistently hitting 700 Mbps on speed tests which is remarkable for a mobile connection. My data balance consumption is predictable and the 56-day validity gives me no stress at all.
Average data validity. 28 days is standard I suppose.
cant blv the intrenet speed is this bad in 2024. my old 3G connection was faster than this garbage. fix ur infrastructure

Satisfied with the data balance accuracy and internet speed on my current plan. Everything aligns with what was promised during purchase. The validity period works out well for my usage pattern and I never feel like I am leaving unused data on the table.
Data balance drains too fast. Definitely not matching my actual usage.
Internet speed is reasonable. Gets the job done without issues.

The short data validity period combined with slow internet speeds makes this plan terrible value for money. I cannot consume the allocated data within the validity window because the speeds are too slow for streaming or downloading large files. A catch-22 situation.
Good data validity on the quarterly plan. Enough for light users.
v bad data balance tracking. shows wrong numbers every time. reacharged 3gb but only got credited 2gb according to app. this keeps happening

Internet speed is fantastic for streaming content in high definition. I have been on this plan for four months now and the consistency has been remarkable. Never once have I experienced throttling or sudden speed drops even during the busiest hours of the day.
Data balance is normal. No unexpected deductions noticed.
tbh the data validity on this plan is decent enough for what i pay. internet speed is ok too. nothing amazing but it works for daily stuff

Very happy with the internet speed and data balance transparency on this network. I switched two months ago and the improvement over my previous carrier is night and day. Data validity of 84 days on my plan means I only recharge four times a year which is very convenient.
Slow internet speed during peak hours. Unusable after 7 PM daily.
Data validity and balance both seem fine to me. Standard experience.
plz explain why my data balance finished in 1 day. i only used whatsapp and checked email. this is clearly a system error on ur end. want immediate resolution

Internet speed is superb on 5G in my area. The data validity of 56 days and generous daily limits make this the ideal plan for heavy users. Call quality is also crystal clear which is a bonus I was not expecting from a data-focused plan.
Internet speed is mediocre at best. Not what was promised.

The data balance feature in the app needs improvement. It only updates once every few hours which makes real-time tracking impossible. I would prefer live usage meters like what competing carriers offer so I can manage my consumption throughout the day.
Impressed with internet speed after switching carriers. Much faster now.
omg worst data validity ever. 14 days plan expired before i could even use half the data. what a scam. never buying this plan again

The internet speed and data balance both work as advertised on this plan. I have monitored my usage carefully for two billing cycles and everything checks out accurately. The data validity window aligns well with my recharge schedule so there is no wastage.
Data balance always confusing. Hard to track actual remaining data.
intrenet speed is ok i guess. not great not terrible. data balance seems accurate which is good at least

Very fast internet speed on the premium plan. Worth the extra cost. I consistently get download speeds above 200 Mbps on 4G itself and the data validity of 84 days means I am not pressured to consume everything quickly. Great overall package.
Data validity is acceptable for the monthly plan. Standard offering.

The internet speed on this network is embarrassingly slow in my entire neighborhood. Multiple residents have complained about the same issue. When I check my data balance it seems correct but what good is having data left if the speed is too slow to actually use it properly.
Internet speed has been satisfactory this month. No major issues.
reacharg kiya but data balance not updated. been 2 hours still showing old balance. prblm every single time i recharge. so frustrating

The data validity options available now are much better than what they offered a year ago. More flexibility in choosing between weekly, monthly, and quarterly plans. Internet speed remains consistent regardless of which validity tier you pick which is reassuring.
Internet speed drops to nothing during rain. Completely unreliable.
Data balance and validity both working as expected. Straightforward.
cant blv they reduced the data validity from 28 to 24 days without even informing customers. same price less validity. how is this acceptable. total disrespect to loyal users

Internet speed consistently above 100 Mbps. Very happy with this carrier. Data balance consumption matches my actual usage patterns perfectly which builds trust. The only minor gripe is the data validity could be slightly longer but at 28 days it is still workable.
Acceptable internet speed for casual browsing and social media.

My data balance has been deducted incorrectly three times this month alone. Each time I have had to call customer care and wait in queue to get it corrected manually. The internet speed is fine but this persistent billing and balance issue is making me consider switching carriers seriously.
Internet speed is good enough. Data validity is standard 28 days.
ur intrenet speed is terrible in my area. plz upgrade towers or something. paying good money for bad service every month

The internet speed on this network is adequate for my daily needs which include video conferencing and occasional streaming. Nothing spectacular but consistently reliable which I value more than peak speed. Data balance is always accurate when I check via USSD codes.
Data validity expired while I still had 5GB remaining. Wasted money.

Happy with the internet speed on my plan. Streaming works without buffering and online gaming has low ping. Data balance depletes at a reasonable rate that matches my actual consumption. Would recommend this plan to moderate users.
Data balance tracking needs improvement. Very confusing interface.
ngl the data validity on the new annual plan is amazing. 365 days no tension about recharging every month. internet speed also consistently solid throughout

Internet speed has degraded noticeably over the past two months in my locality. I used to consistently get 80 Mbps but now it hovers around 15 to 20 Mbps during most of the day. Data balance drains faster too which suggests background processes are consuming more due to retries on the slow connection.
Average internet speed. Nothing impressive but functional.

custmer care was helpful in resolving my data balance prblm. they credited back the wrongly deducted amount within 24 hours. internet speed also seems to have improved after they reset something on their end

The internet speed and data validity on my current plan are both perfectly adequate for my usage level. I browse social media watch some videos and use maps for navigation daily. Never ran into balance issues and the 28-day validity works with my monthly budget cycle.
